tests.question: Какие станки есть на заводе?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT name, num, oeeplan FROM mdc_machine;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT name, num, oeeplan FROM mdc_machine LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Какие подразделения (цеха) есть в системе MDC?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT d.id, d.name FROM mdc_dept d;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT name FROM mdc_dept LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Какие состояния станков есть в справочнике?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT name, code, priority FROM mdc_machine_param;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT name, short_name, code, priority FROM mdc_machine_param LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Какие группы состояний станков существуют?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT DISTINCT gp.name FROM mdc_group_param gp;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT name, short_name, plan_value FROM mdc_group_param LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи историю состояний станков
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT m.name AS machine_name, mp.name AS param_name, mv.start_time, mv.end_time, gp.name AS group_name 
FROM mdc_monitoring_value_129 mv 
JOIN mdc_machine m ON mv.machine_id = m.id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON mv.machine_param_id = mp.id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param_in_group mping ON mp.id = mping.mdc_machine_param_id 
JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON mping.mdc_group_param_id = gp.id 
ORDER BY mv.start_time DESC LIMIT 50;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS state, mv.start_time, mv.end_time FROM mdc_monitoring_value_129 mv JOIN mdc_machine m ON mv.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON mv.machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Какие программы выполнялись на станках?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT DISTINCT l.name_up, l.machine_id, l.dt_start, l.dt_end FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l ORDER BY l.dt_start DESC LIMIT 50;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, l.name_up, l.dt_start, l.dt_end, l.processing_time FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи расписание работы станков
tests.actual_sql: SELECT sb.machine_id, sb.week_day_num, sb.smena_num, sbi.time_from, sbi.time_to FROM mdc_shedule_base sb JOIN mdc_shedule_base_item sbi ON sb.id = sbi.shedule_base_id ORDER BY sb.machine_id, sb.week_day_num, sb.smena_num;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, sb.name, sb.week_day_num, sb.smena_num, sbi.time_from, sbi.time_to FROM mdc_shedule_base sb JOIN mdc_machine m ON sb.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_shedule_base_item sbi ON sb.id = sbi.shedule_base_id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи настройки контроля параметров на станках
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT tcs.id, tcs.name, tcs.group_param_id, tcs.machine_param_id, m.name AS machine_name, mp.name AS param_name 
FROM mdc_technology_control_setting tcs 
JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON tcs.machine_param_id = mp.id 
JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pm ON mp.id = pm.machine_param_id 
JOIN mdc_machine m ON pm.machine_id = m.id;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT name, group_param_id, machine_param_id FROM mdc_technology_control_setting LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи журнал нарушений контроля параметров
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT ctl.param_value, ctl.dt_start, ctl.dt_end, tcs.name AS control_setting, mcp.name AS param_name 
FROM mdc_technology_control_log ctl 
JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting tcs ON ctl.technology_control_setting_id = tcs.id 
JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pim ON ctl.param_in_machine_id = pim.id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param mcp ON pim.machine_param_id = mcp.id 
ORDER BY ctl.dt_start DESC LIMIT 50;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT technology_control_setting_id, param_in_machine_id, param_value, dt_start, dt_end FROM mdc_technology_control_log LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи состояния станков, привязанные к группам
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.name AS machine_name, m.num AS machine_num, mp.name AS param_name, mp.code AS param_code, gp.name AS group_name, gp.color AS group_color 
FROM mdc_machine m 
JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pm ON m.id = pm.machine_id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON pm.machine_param_id = mp.id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param_in_group mping ON mp.id = mping.mdc_machine_param_id 
JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON mping.mdc_group_param_id = gp.id;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT mdc_machine_param_id, mdc_group_param_id FROM mdc_machine_param_in_group LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи станки с указанием их цеха
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine_name, m.num AS inventory_number, d.name AS dept_name FROM mdc_machine m JOIN mdc_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name, m.num, d.name AS dept_name FROM mdc_machine m JOIN mdc_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Кто и какие программы выполнял на станках?
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT w.surname, w.name, l.name_up AS program_name, m.name AS machine_name, l.dt_start, l.dt_end, l.processing_time 
FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l 
JOIN hr_worker w ON l.worker_id = w.id 
JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id 
ORDER BY l.dt_start DESC;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, w.surname, w.name, l.name_up, l.dt_start, l.processing_time FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id JOIN hr_worker w ON l.worker_id = w.id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи детали, которые обрабатывались на станках
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT tp.name AS detail_name, l.machine_id 
FROM tp_assembly_unit tp 
JOIN mdc_operating_program_assembly_unit poa ON tp.id = poa.id_assembly_unit 
JOIN mdc_operating_program_execution_log l ON poa.machine_id = l.machine_id AND poa.name_up = l.name_up;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, au.name AS detail_name, opa.name_up AS program_name FROM mdc_operating_program_assembly_unit opa JOIN mdc_machine m ON opa.machine_id = m.id JOIN tp_assembly_unit au ON opa.id_assembly_unit = au.id ORDER BY m.name, au.name;

tests.question: Покажи какие состояния отслеживаются на каждом станке
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT m.name AS machine_name, mp.name AS state_name, mp.code, mp.priority 
FROM mdc_machine m 
JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pm ON m.id = pm.machine_id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON pm.machine_param_id = mp.id 
ORDER BY m.name, mp.priority;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS param_name FROM mdc_param_in_machine pim JOIN mdc_machine m ON pim.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON pim.machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи нарушения контроля с привязкой к станкам
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT m.name AS станок, tcl.param_value, tcl.dt_start, tcl.dt_end, tcl.technology_operation_id 
FROM mdc_technology_control_log tcl 
JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pm ON tcl.param_in_machine_id = pm.id 
JOIN mdc_machine m ON pm.machine_id = m.id 
ORDER BY tcl.dt_start DESC 
LIMIT 50;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, tcs.name AS control_setting, tcl.param_value, tcl.dt_start, tcl.dt_end FROM mdc_technology_control_log tcl JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pim ON tcl.param_in_machine_id = pim.id JOIN mdc_machine m ON pim.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting tcs ON tcl.technology_control_setting_id = tcs.id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи особые даты в расписании станков (праздники)
tests.actual_sql: SELECT shedule_date, dept_id, machine_id FROM mdc_shedule_meta WHERE is_holiday = 1 ORDER BY shedule_date DESC;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, sm.shedule_date, sm.is_holiday FROM mdc_shedule_meta sm JOIN mdc_machine m ON sm.machine_id = m.id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи типы контроля параметров
tests.actual_sql: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM mdc_technology_control_setting;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT id, technology_control_setting_id, type_id, is_tolerance, is_emergency FROM mdc_technology_control_type LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Какое общее время простоев у каждого станка?
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT m.name, m.num, SUM(r.state_time) AS total_downtime_seconds 
FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r 
JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param_in_group mmpi ON mp.id = mmpi.mdc_machine_param_id 
JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON mmpi.mdc_group_param_id = gp.id 
WHERE gp.name LIKE '%Простой%' 
GROUP BY m.id;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, SUM(r.state_time) AS total_downtime_seconds FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id WHERE mp.id IN (SELECT mdc_machine_param_id FROM mdc_machine_param_in_group WHERE mdc_group_param_id IN (SELECT id FROM mdc_group_param WHERE name LIKE '%Простой%')) GROUP BY m.name;

tests.question: Сколько программ выполнено на каждом станке?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name, COUNT(*) AS programs_executed FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id GROUP BY m.id, m.name;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, COUNT(l.id) AS program_count, SUM(l.processing_time) AS total_time FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id GROUP BY m.name;

tests.question: Покажи аналитику по состояниям станков из rep_monitoring_by_priority
tests.actual_sql: SELECT r.mdc_machineid, m.name AS machine_name, r.mdc_machine_param_id, mp.name AS param_name, r.from_date, r.to_date, r.state_time, r.shift_num, r.dt_calc FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS state_name, r.from_date, r.to_date, r.state_time, r.shift_num FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Какие программы привязаны к каким сборочным единицам на каждом станке?
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT p.name_up AS program_name, a.name AS assembly_unit, m.name AS machine_name 
FROM mdc_operating_program_assembly_unit p 
JOIN mdc_machine m ON p.machine_id = m.id 
JOIN tp_assembly_unit a ON p.id_assembly_unit = a.id;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, opa.name_up, au.name AS assembly_unit FROM mdc_operating_program_assembly_unit opa JOIN mdc_machine m ON opa.machine_id = m.id JOIN tp_assembly_unit au ON opa.id_assembly_unit = au.id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи настройки контроля с привязкой к группам состояний и параметрам
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT tcs.id, tcs.name, gp.name AS group_name, mp.name AS param_name 
FROM mdc_technology_control_setting tcs 
JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON tcs.group_param_id = gp.id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON tcs.machine_param_id = mp.id;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT tcs.name, gp.name AS group_name, mp.name AS param_name FROM mdc_technology_control_setting tcs JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON tcs.group_param_id = gp.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON tcs.machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи станки у которых плановый OEE больше нуля
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name, m.num, m.oeeplan FROM mdc_machine m WHERE m.oeeplan > 0 LIMIT 50;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT name, num, oeeplan FROM mdc_machine WHERE oeeplan > 0 LIMIT 50;

tests.question: Покажи полную информацию о работе каждого станка: цех, программы, оператор
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT m.name, m.num, d.name, l.name_up, w.surname, w.name 
FROM mdc_machine m 
JOIN mdc_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id 
LEFT JOIN mdc_operating_program_execution_log l ON m.id = l.machine_id 
LEFT JOIN hr_worker w ON l.worker_id = w.id 
ORDER BY m.name LIMIT 50;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, m.num, d.name AS dept_name, l.name_up AS last_program, l.dt_start AS program_start, l.processing_time, w.surname AS worker_surname, w.name AS worker_name, w.prof_name FROM mdc_machine m LEFT JOIN mdc_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN mdc_operating_program_execution_log l ON m.id = l.machine_id LEFT JOIN hr_worker w ON l.worker_id = w.id ORDER BY m.name;

tests.question: Сравни загрузку и простой станков по каждому цеху
tests.actual_sql: SELECT r.dept_num, hd.name AS dept_name, SUM(r.mdc_machine_load_time) AS load_time, SUM(r.mdc_machine_break_time) AS break_time FROM rep_main_analitic r JOIN hr_dept hd ON r.dept_num = hd.root_num GROUP BY r.dept_num, hd.name ORDER BY r.dept_num;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT d.name AS dept_name, r.mdc_machine_load_time AS load_time, r.mdc_machine_break_time AS break_time, r.mdc_machine_fund AS fund_time, ROUND(r.mdc_machine_load_time * 100.0 / r.mdc_machine_fund, 2) AS load_percent FROM rep_main_analitic r JOIN hr_dept d ON r.dept_num = d.root_num WHERE r.mdc_machine_fund > 0 ORDER BY load_percent DESC;

tests.question: Какие станки имели наибольший простой в последний месяц?
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT m.name, SUM(r.state_time) AS total_downtime_seconds 
FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r 
JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id 
JOIN mdc_machine_param_in_group mping ON mp.id = mping.mdc_machine_param_id 
JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON mping.mdc_group_param_id = gp.id 
WHERE gp.name LIKE '%Простой%' 
AND r.from_date >= date('now', '-1 month') 
GROUP BY m.id 
ORDER BY total_downtime_seconds DESC 
LIMIT 50;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS state_name, SUM(r.state_time) AS total_seconds FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id WHERE r.from_date >= date('now', '-1 month') GROUP BY m.name, mp.name ORDER BY total_seconds DESC LIMIT 10;

tests.question: Покажи состояния станков с группировкой по группам состояний
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT gp.name AS group_name, COUNT(DISTINCT pm.machine_id) AS machine_count
FROM mdc_group_param gp
JOIN mdc_machine_param_in_group mgp ON gp.id = mgp.mdc_group_param_id
JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON mgp.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id
JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pm ON mp.id = pm.machine_param_id
GROUP BY gp.name;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT gp.name AS group_name, mp.name AS param_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mdc_machine_param_in_group mpg JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON mpg.mdc_group_param_id = gp.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON mpg.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id GROUP BY gp.name, mp.name;

tests.question: Покажи расписание станков с временными интервалами и привязкой к цехам
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT sb.machine_id, m.name AS machine_name, d.name AS dept_name, sb.week_day_num, sb.smena_num, sbi.time_from, sbi.time_to 
FROM mdc_shedule_base sb 
JOIN mdc_shedule_base_item sbi ON sb.id = sbi.shedule_base_id 
JOIN mdc_machine m ON sb.machine_id = m.id 
JOIN mdc_dept d ON sb.dept_id = d.id;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, d.name AS dept_name, sb.name AS schedule_name, sb.week_day_num, sb.smena_num, sbi.time_from, sbi.time_to FROM mdc_shedule_base sb JOIN mdc_machine m ON sb.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_dept d ON sb.dept_id = d.id JOIN mdc_shedule_base_item sbi ON sb.id = sbi.shedule_base_id ORDER BY m.name, sb.week_day_num;

tests.question: Покажи все нарушения контроля с названиями станков и настройками
tests.actual_sql:
SELECT l.param_value, l.dt_start, l.dt_end, m.name AS machine_name, m.num, s.name AS setting_name, s.group_param_id, s.machine_param_id 
FROM mdc_technology_control_log l 
JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pim ON l.param_in_machine_id = pim.id 
JOIN mdc_machine m ON pim.machine_id = m.id 
JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting s ON l.technology_control_setting_id = s.id 
ORDER BY l.dt_start DESC LIMIT 50;
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, tcs.name AS setting_name, tcl.param_value, tcl.dt_start, tcl.dt_end FROM mdc_technology_control_log tcl JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pim ON tcl.param_in_machine_id = pim.id JOIN mdc_machine m ON pim.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting tcs ON tcl.technology_control_setting_id = tcs.id ORDER BY tcl.dt_start DESC;
